message:
test(resize): add 39 integration tests for resize_crash_forensics module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- Builder edge cases: default gate, disabled gate, chain 100 transactions,
  chain 20 domain budgets
- Policy decision bounding: exact boundary (64), one-past, many-past eviction
- All policy decision kinds in single context, snake_case serde verification
- All execution phases, all domain types, both work classes
- Serialization round-trips: rich context, empty context, SSH host, Mux endpoint
- Summary line: all fields present, zero values, u32::MAX/u64::MAX values
- Global state: update/get/clear lifecycle, build_and_update_global
- Concurrency: 8-thread writes, 16-thread mixed reads/writes
- Stress: 100 in-flight + 100 decisions + 15 domains, large JSON roundtrip
- Crash bundle integration: forensics file presence, manifest flag, redaction
  preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
